news.t: Hot tech stock ETFs, from AI to quantum computing, have made investors lots of money. Is it time to sell?

holdings.infoBox: JTEK is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 4.88%, Intel at 4.66%, Lam Research at 4.66%, NVIDIA at 3.75%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 3.54%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan U.S. Tech Leaders ETF (JTEK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that identifies US equities that are perceived as leaders in technology and technology-enabled industries such as engineering & construction, entertainment, biotechnology, pharmaceuticals, REITs, and energy-alternate sources. JTEK was launched on Oct 4, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: Hot tech stock ETFs, from AI to quantum computing, have made investors lots of money. Is it time to sell?
data.text: Thematic ETFs tied to trends like artificial intelligence and quantum computing have drawn billions in new money into the market, and the portfolios have been rewarding investors with big gains. But E...
